data.title: Texas House committee passes Bitcoin reserve bill for full floor vote
data.description:
A Texas House Committee has passed a Republican-backed bill to create a Bitcoin reserve, which now only needs a successful full floor vote before heading to the governor’s desk. The Texas House Committee on Delivery of Government Efficiency passed Senate Bill 21 with no amendments on May 7 in a 9-4 vote along party lines. The bill has already passed the Texas Senate, in a 25-5 vote on March 6. SB 21 would establish the “Texas Strategic Bitcoin Reserve,” controlled by the state’s comptroller — currently Glenn Hegar — who would be permitted to invest in digital assets that have obtained a market cap of at least $500 billion over the last twelve months, which would currently only include Bitcoin (BTC)
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/texas-house-committee-passes-bitcoin-reserve-bill-for-full-floor-vote?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: CZ: The option to buy Bitcoin before the government is disappearing
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance founder CZ cited the news that Arizona has officially legislated the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Act on the X platform, and said: Investors can buy when the government starts buying or after the government buys, and the option of "before the government buys" is gradually disappearing.

data.title: OpenAI's Sam Altman to Focus More on Research and Security
data.description: According to Foresight News, OpenAI founder Sam Altman announced via a tweet that a co-founder of the Metrodora Institute has joined the team as the CEO of applications. Altman stated that he will continue in his role as CEO of OpenAI but will now be able to concentrate more on research, computing, and security under the new arrangement.

data.title: The current winning probability of DOOD’s whitelist activity on OKX Wallet is 1.15%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official website, the whitelist activity launched by Doodles and OKX Wallet currently has more than 173,000 participants. Users who hold more than 0.1 SOL in their wallets and complete the corresponding interactive tasks can participate in the DOOD token subscription. The number of whitelists is 2,000, and the current winning probability is 1.15%.

data.title: Coinbase releases over 10,000 pages of government correspondence documents, revealing that the SEC knew about the crypto regulatory gaps
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Paul Grewal, Chief Legal Officer of Coinbase, posted on the X platform that Coinbase has made public more than 10,000 pages of regulatory documents obtained through the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) to promote government transparency. He pointed out key materials including the SEC's internal recognition of the "crypto regulatory gap" in 2019, the New York Attorney General's request to the SEC in 2023 to support ETH's claim as a security, and the SEC's inability to view Coinbase's response video due to IT problems, emphasizing that this battle for information transparency is related to the right to know of the entire society.

data.title: CZ: Be cautious about the long-term value of TRUMP coins, market sentiment is still a big driving factor in the crypto market
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CZ said in a podcast interview on Tuesday that TRUMP coin is a very interesting phenomenon. "I think its emergence reflects a feature of the crypto market, that is, it responds very quickly to hot events and celebrity effects. As a highly controversial figure, Trump's name alone can attract a lot of attention. So, the popularity of this token is somewhat expected. 
However, from the perspective of investment and long-term value, I would be more cautious. Many of these types of tokens are more based on hype than real technological innovation or fundamental support. I think it is important for investors to distinguish which projects have real potential and which are just short-term hype. The crypto market has matured a lot, but this celebrity-related token craze also reminds us that market sentiment is still a big driving factor." 
In addition, CZ said that the news cycle often has a certain impact on the rise and fall of tokens. "Especially for new entrants to the industry, they may feel that the crypto market is more like a speculative place than a technology-driven ecosystem. But on the other hand, this also illustrates the inclusiveness of the crypto market-anyone can participate and any idea can be tried. This is both its advantage and its challenge."

data.title: OpenAI Appoints Fidji Simo as CEO of Applications Division
data.description: According to PANews, OpenAI has announced the appointment of Fidji Simo as the CEO of its Applications Division. Simo will report directly to Sam Altman, who will continue in his role as the overall CEO of OpenAI, focusing on research, computational power, and safety issues. Fidji Simo, a former executive at Facebook, played a key role in the development of products such as Facebook Live. She also serves as the chair of the Metrodora Foundation, an organization dedicated to neuroimmune research.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs had a total net inflow of $142 million yesterday, and none of the twelve ETFs had a net outflow
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (May 7, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$142 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Ark Invest and 21Shares' ETF ARKB, with a single-day net inflow of US$54.7263 million. Currently, ARKB's total net inflow has reached US$2.681 billion.
The second is Fidelity ETF FBTC, with a single-day net inflow of US$39.919 million. Currently, FBTC's total net inflow has reached US$11.637 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is US$112.712 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to total Bitcoin market value) is 5.86%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$40.719 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net outflow of $21.7739 million yesterday, and none of the nine ETFs had a net inflow
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (May 7, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was US$21.7739 million.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF ETHA, with a single-day net outflow of US$21.7739 million. Currently, ETHA has a total net inflow of US$4.18 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs was US$6.197 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to Ethereum's total market value) reached 2.85%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$2.468 billion.

data.title: Ethereum Spot ETF Experiences Significant Outflow on May 7
data.description: According to PANews, data from SoSoValue reveals that on May 7, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $21.77 million. This occurred during Eastern Time, with none of the nine products recording positive inflows. Notably, BlackRock's ETHA experienced a single-day outflow of $21.77 million. Currently, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs stands at $6.197 billion, representing 2.85% of Ethereum's total market capitalization. Historically, the cumulative net inflow amounts to $2.468 billion.

data.title: OCC Grants Banks Permission to Buy and Sell Custody-Held Cryptocurrencies
data.description:

data.title: Bitget and Avalanche to jointly invest $10 million to promote the development of India's crypto ecosystem
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget and Avalanche have reached a cooperation to jointly support the development and construction of the local Web3 community in India. According to the cooperation plan, the two parties will first implement related projects in Delhi and Bangalore, with a total planned investment of no less than 10 million US dollars to support local community activities such as micro-grants, scholarships, hackathons and technical workshops. Delhi is the most populous city in India, while Bangalore is known as the "Silicon Valley of India", gathering a large number of technical talents and developer resources.
In recent years, the Indian crypto market has heated up rapidly. According to data released by the local trading platform CoinSwitch, crypto investment in India will continue to grow in 2024, of which Delhi investment accounts for 20.1%, Bangalore and Mumbai account for 9.6% and 6.5% respectively. This also shows India's strategic potential and community vitality in the global Web3 ecosystem.

data.title: Binance will suspend XEC deposits and withdrawals to cooperate with the network hard fork upgrade
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance will suspend the deposit and withdrawal services of the eCash (XEC) network at 19:00 Beijing time on May 15, 2025 to support its network upgrade and hard fork. The hard fork will be carried out at block height 1,747,310,400 (approximately UTC 12:00). 
Transactions will not be affected during this period, and the deposit and withdrawal functions will be automatically restored after the network stabilizes.
